title: Prakas #599 on the Implementation of the Pre-Shipment Inspection Service_000831
title_en: Prakas #599 on the Implementation of the Pre-Shipment Inspection Service_000831
short_name: Prakas #599 on the Implementation of the Pre-Shipment Ins...

provisions.title: Promulgate the Regulation on the Implementation of the Pre-Shipment
provisions.content: Inspection Service which appears as Appendix to this Prakas.

provisions.title: The Regulation, which is the Appendix to this Prakas, is the guidelines for the
provisions.content:
implementation of the Agreement between the Royal Government of Cambodia and SGS
on Pre-Shipment Inspection dated 14 August 2000.

provisions.title: Companies or persons who fail to apply for Pre-Shipment Inspection of goods,
provisions.content:
except the exempt goods as referred to in Article 3 of Chapter 2 of the Regulation, and
have transported the goods into the Customs territory of the Kingdom of Cambodia will be
imposed by a penalty in the amount of 7% of the goods CIF value. In the case of necessity,
external assistance might be required for customs clearance of goods circumvented PSI.

provisions.title: Delegate of the Royal Government in charge of Customs and Excise, Secretary
provisions.content:
General, Director of Cabinet, Directors of relevant Departments of the Ministry of
Economy and Finance, must effectively implement this Prakas from the date of signature.

Senior Minister
Minister of Economy and Finance
(signature and seal)
KEAT CHHON
cc:
- The Council of Ministers
- Cabinet of the Prime Minister Office
- General Secretariat of the Parliament
- Ministry of Interior
- Ministry of Commerce
- The Council for the Development of Cambodia
- Municipal and provincial authorities
- Phnom Penh Chamber of Commerce
- SGS Liaison Office in Cambodia
- Documentation
